decisions: Codex owns structured Intake and Work Unit population.
The manager owns canonical writes and validation.
Initialize the current workspace as Git.

nonBlocking: Human final review and promotion remain after AI execution.

risks: The Work Unit manager imports shared Intake mechanics.
Changing metadata field types would require historical migration.
mitigations: Keep lifecycle invalidation conditional on artifactType.
Put specification resolution on specification-impact attributes.
Run Intake and Work Unit manager suites.

content.decision: Execute this Work Unit through codex exec in a fresh non-interactive session; a persistent Goal is not required for this execution route.
